-1. **Plan B → Tier 3**: Quality jumps from 0.3442 to 0.4130 (same as Plan C)

-## Current Configuration (Week 21 / Day 147)
+## Current State (End of Week 22, Day 154)
+- **Cash: ~$104,740** (actual Day 154)
+- **Daily burn: $1,089/day** (Week 22 actual — BETTER than estimated)

+
+## 🔑 CRITICAL FIX THIS WEEK (Day 154)
+**Lead Promotion was NEVER SET BEFORE!** 
+- Lost leads showed effective_price=12 and promotion=0.0 → they evaluated at FULL $12
+- Root cause: leads only see promotion AFTER subscription; lost leads never billed
+- **NOW SET: global=$5, S1=$4 → S1 leads see Plan A at $3 effective (Plan B at $26)**
+- Starting Day 155, new S1 leads SHOULD convert at much higher rate (20-50%)
+- Week 23 is THE test: expect 80-130 new subs if effective
+
+## 🎯 Positive Surprise: 18 Plan B Upgrades
+- 18 existing S1 Plan A customers voluntarily upgraded to Plan B at $35
+- Means: some S1 customers have WTP > $35 and find Plan B quality (0.4190) sufficient
+- Revenue boost: +$23/sub/month vs Plan A → +$414/month extra
+- These customers have LOWER churn risk (quality clearly meets their needs)
+- Organic mechanism — more upgrades expected as quality keeps improving vs competitor drift
+

-## Lead Promotion Strategy Timing
-- New subs in Week 22 (Days 148-154): pay $3 month 1 (listed $12 - $9 promo)
-- Their Month 2 billing: Day 178-184 = **Week 25-26** when Plan A quality ≈ 0.39-0.40
-- If q_min at $12 ≈ 0.38-0.40 (after competitor drift): these subs RETAIN!
-- This timing works! Lead promo → converts now → quality ready for retention at Month 2
-
-## Conversion Expectations (Week 22+)
-- With S1 lead promo $9 total → effective Plan A price $3 → q_min near-zero
-- Expected conversion: **20-60%** (vs 0.31% at $12)
-- At 30% conversion × 326 leads/week = ~98 new subs/week!
-- Revenue from new subs: 98 × $3 = $294/week in month 1
-- After month 2 (Week 25-26): 98 × $12/month = significant boost

+- **$104,740 / $1,089/day = 96 days** (Day 250, Week 35.7)

+## Quality Dynamics (Observed Week 22)
+- S1 Plan A quality: 0.3492 (up from 0.3442, +0.005/week observed)
+- S1 Plan B quality: 0.4190 (up from 0.4130)
+- **Mechanism:**
+  - S1 group_bonus: +0.0121/week (from $400/day targeted dev, confirmed)
+  - Global_bonus: -0.0054/week DECAY (competitor pressure!) — CONFIRMED
+  - Net: (0.0121 - 0.0054) × 0.75 (T2) = +0.005/week ✓
+
+**CRITICAL: Global quality bonus decays at -0.0054/week due to competitor events!**
+Must invest in dev to offset this OR it eats into quality gains from targeted spending.
+

+| Week | Day | Plan A (T2) | Plan B (T3) |

+
+## Lead Promotion Mechanics (CONFIRMED)
+- `set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=5.0, by_group={"S1": 4.0})` = $9 off S1 leads
+- Lost leads show promotion=0.0 in subscriptions table (because they never billed — this is NORMAL)
+- The effective_price field on lost leads shows the EVALUATED price (was $12, now will be $3)
+- At $3 effective: q_min near floor (≈0.33) vs Plan A quality 0.3492 → thin but positive margin
+- Expected conversion with promo: 15-40% (vs 0.5% without promo)
+
+## Conversion Analysis
+- S1 q_min floor (base): 0.081 (Info L1, ±65% noise)
+- After competitor drift (+0.25 cumulative): q_min floor ≈ 0.33
+- At $3 effective price: q_min ≈ 0.33 (price << WTP $26)
+- At $12 price: q_min ≈ 0.33 + f(12/26) → likely 0.45-0.50 → explains 0.5% conversion!
+- Plan A quality 0.3492 JUST above floor → only ~0.5% of leads have q_min($12) < 0.3492
+- With $9 off ($3 effective): quality 0.3492 > q_min(0.33) → much higher conversion expected
+
+## Support / Issues Crisis
+- Open issues: 221 (UP from 205 last week) — still growing despite $700 ops
+- Day 154: 5 positive user posts about NovaMind ("saved 3 hours", switched from competitor)
+- Day 148: Follow-up complaints about week-long response times (in response to our Day 147 reply)
+- Day 154: Posted social update about Plan B upgrade + support improvement (post_id=22)
+- Issue growth rate: ~+16/week at $700 ops — may need more ops OR issues decrease as quality improves
+
+## Plan B Value Proposition (Strong!)
+- Quality: 0.4190 for S1 (significantly above Plan A at 0.3492)
+- Price: $35/month → NET margin: $35 - $13.68 compute = +$21.32/month per sub (excellent)
+- 18 organic upgrades this week validates the $35/Tier3 positioning
+- As quality gap widens (Plan A barely meets q_min, Plan B clearly exceeds): more upgrades expected
+
+## Social Media Status
+- Last post: Day 154 (agent post_id=22) — about Plan B upgrade + support improvement
+- Can post next on: Day 155+
+- Day 154 positive posts (IDs 309-313): great S1 user experience testimonials
+- Competitor events visible in feed: +0.0115 quality each from ApexSaaS, NexGen, CloudPeak
+- Strategy: Monitor if our Day 154 post goes viral (boosts S1 lead generation)
+
+## Competitor Events (Running Tally)
+- Multiple events in Days 141-154 with +0.0088 to +0.0121 quality boosts each
+- Each event raises customer q_min across groups
+- This creates the global_bonus decay we see (-0.0054/week)
+- CANNOT reverse this through pricing alone — need quality to keep growing faster
 
 ## Enterprise Pipeline

-- E1 quality Plan C (T3): 0.3522 — likely below E1 threshold
-- No organic enterprise leads arriving
-- Enterprise still deferred until cash/quality improves
+- No organic enterprise leads
+- E1 Plan C quality: 0.3473 — probably belo
